name: Gaming Mouse
description: High-performance RGB gaming mouse featuring up to 12,800 DPI, 6 programmable buttons, ergonomic right-handed design, durable switches rated for 20 million clicks, and customizable lighting effects for competitive gaming.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Mechanical gaming keyboard with tactile switches, customizable RGB backlighting, anti-ghosting support, full N-key rollover, aluminum frame, and detachable USB cable for reliable everyday performance.

name: 24-inch IPS Monitor
description: 24-inch Full HD IPS gaming monitor with a smooth 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, HDR support, adaptive sync technology, ultra-thin bezels, and vibrant color reproduction for gaming and productivity.

name: USB Flash Drive 64GB
description: 64GB USB 3.0 flash drive with fast read and write speeds, compact metal design, plug-and-play compatibility, and reliable storage for documents, photos, videos, and backups.

name: Bluetooth Headset
description: Wireless Bluetooth headset featuring crystal-clear stereo sound, built-in noise-reducing microphone, soft memory foam ear cushions, up to 30 hours of battery life, and USB-C fast charging.

name: Gaming Chair
description: Premium ergonomic gaming chair with adjustable armrests, reclining backrest up to 155°, lumbar and neck support pillows, high-density foam padding, and a durable steel frame.

name: Laptop Backpack
description: Stylish water-resistant backpack designed for laptops up to 15.6 inches, featuring multiple storage compartments, padded shoulder straps, hidden security pocket, and reinforced carrying handle.

name: 27-inch 2K Monitor
description: 27-inch QHD IPS gaming monitor with 2560×1440 resolution, 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, HDR support, adaptive sync, wide color gamut, and adjustable ergonomic stand.

name: Wireless Controller
description: Ergonomic wireless controller compatible with PC, featuring dual vibration motors, precision analog sticks, responsive triggers, rechargeable battery, and Bluetooth or USB connectivity.

name: 1080P Webcam
description: Full HD 1080p webcam with autofocus, dual built-in microphones, automatic low-light correction, privacy shutter, and universal clip for online meetings, streaming, and video calls.

name: Gaming Desk
description: Spacious gaming desk with durable carbon-fiber textured surface, integrated cable management, sturdy steel frame, headphone hook, cup holder, and enough room for dual-monitor setups.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: High-speed 1TB USB-C portable SSD delivering transfer speeds up to 1050MB/s, compact shock-resistant design, plug-and-play support, and compatibility with Windows, macOS, Android, and gaming consoles.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with rich stereo sound, deep bass, IPX5 water resistance, up to 15 hours of battery life, built-in microphone, and support for AUX and microSD playback.

name: Gaming Headset Pro
description: Professional gaming headset featuring immersive 7.1 surround sound, detachable noise-canceling microphone, memory foam ear cushions, RGB lighting, and multi-platform compatibility.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Comfortable wireless optical mouse with adjustable DPI settings, silent click buttons, ergonomic shape, reliable 2.4GHz connection, energy-efficient design, and up to 12 months of battery life.
